title: Syntherisma panicea
taxonomy: Syntherisma panicea belongs to the family Crambidae, specifically within the subfamily Spilomematinae. This classification places it among the moths, as it is a type of grass moth. Syntherisma panicea is a part of the genus Syntherisma, which is characterized by its unique characteristics and distribution. The species is further classified into its binomial nomenclature, Syntherisma panicea, which is used to identify it uniquely. This classification helps in understanding the evolutionary relationships and characteristics of the species.

The plant is also believed to have antioxidant properties, which may help protect against cell damage and oxidative stress. In some cultures, Syntherisma panicea is used to treat various ailments, including fever, rheumatism, and skin conditions.
